title: nie widze menu exportu calego projektu i innych przyciskow ktore byly dostepne w projekcie w gornej

criteria.description: Tools (Draw, Text, Icons) are visible in the top Toolbar component
criteria.how_to_verify: Check client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx for the inclusion of <ToolSelector />
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx line 35 includes <ToolSelector />. client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ToolSelector.tsx contains Pencil (Draw), Type (Text), and various Icons.

criteria.description: Export actions are grouped under a DropdownMenu
criteria.how_to_verify: Check client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx for DropdownMenu containing handleFlattenAndDownload and handleExportProject
criteria.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx lines 98-143 define a DropdownMenu for 'Export' containing 'Merge and Export as PDF' (handleFlattenAndDownload) and 'Export Project Files (.zip)' (handleExportProject).

criteria.description: ObjectToolbar is completely removed from the project
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify client/src/components/editor/ObjectToolbar.tsx does not exist and is not imported in client/src/pages/home.tsx
criteria.evidence: Verified that client/src/components/editor/ObjectToolbar.tsx does not exist. grep search for 'ObjectToolbar' in client/src/ returned 0 matches, confirming it is not imported or used.

criteria.how_to_verify: Run npm run check and ensure 0 errors
criteria.evidence: Executed 'npm run check' (tsc) which completed successfully with 0 errors.
